feedback.text: I wish game publishers/sellers stopped treating games that WE BUY from them as not ours. Throught the years I bought several digital copies of games that I can no longer access, such as God of War or Remember Me. If I am buying it, am I not owning it? If game developers don't want to support their game, that's fine, but If I bought it, they somehow should transfer me a code that will allow me to play because I should OWN IT.
